creator: jcfyecrayz@liamekaens.com
text:
Created attachment 164969
[patch] v2: update to 1.0.0

Here's v2 of the patch that includes the recommended changes from comment 1 after "svn rename pyzor py-pyzor".

There are some useful docs/ .rst files in the github tarball that aren't in the pypi tarball.  But there was nothing in the previous patch to install them, and they are the same as what's available at the pyzor.org web page.  So I didn't try to incorporate those docs.
